Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.annotations

Annotation Interface Setting

@Inherited @Retention(RUNTIME) @Target(TYPE) public @interface Setting
Meilisearch Setting
Author:
Junghoon Ban
See Also:
  • Settings

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String[]
    dictionary
    defines the dictionary
    String[]
    displayedAttributes
    attributes to be displayed in the search results
    String
    distinctAttribute
    attribute to be used for distinct
    Embedder[]
    embedders
    defines the embedders configuration for AI-powered search
    String[]
    filterableAttributes
    defines the filterable attributes
    LocalizedAttribute[]
    localizedAttributes
    defines the localized attributes
    String[]
    nonSeparatorTokens
    defines the non-separator tokens
    String
    proximityPrecision
    defines the proximity precision
    String[]
    rankingRules
    defines the ranking rules
    String[]
    searchableAttributes
    attributes to be used for searching
    int
    searchCutoffMs
    defines the search cutoff time in milliseconds if value is -1, this setting will be disabled
    String[]
    separatorTokens
    defines the separator tokens
    String[]
    sortableAttributes
    attributes to be used for sorting
    String[]
    stopWords
    defines the stop words
    Synonym[]
    synonyms
    defines the synonyms

  • Element Details

    • sortableAttributes

      String[] sortableAttributes
      attributes to be used for sorting
      See Also:
      • Sortable attributes
      Default:
      {}

    • distinctAttribute

      String distinctAttribute
      attribute to be used for distinct
      See Also:
      • Distinct attribute
      Default:
      ""

    • searchableAttributes

      String[] searchableAttributes
      attributes to be used for searching
      See Also:
      • Searchable attributes
      Default:
      {}

    • displayedAttributes

      String[] displayedAttributes
      attributes to be displayed in the search results
      See Also:
      • Displayed attributes
      Default:
      {}

    • rankingRules

      String[] rankingRules
      defines the ranking rules
      See Also:
      • Ranking rules
      Default:
      {}

    • stopWords

      String[] stopWords
      defines the stop words
      See Also:
      • Stop words
      Default:
      {}

    • filterableAttributes

      String[] filterableAttributes
      defines the filterable attributes
      See Also:
      • Filterable attributes
      Default:
      {}

    • synonyms

      Synonym[] synonyms
      defines the synonyms
      See Also:
      • Synonyms
      Default:
      {}

    • dictionary

      String[] dictionary
      defines the dictionary
      See Also:
      • Dictionary
      Default:
      {}

    • proximityPrecision

      String proximityPrecision
      defines the proximity precision
      See Also:
      • Proximity precision
      Default:
      ""

    • searchCutoffMs

      int searchCutoffMs
      defines the search cutoff time in milliseconds if value is -1, this setting will be disabled
      See Also:
      • Search cutoff ms
      Default:
      -1

    • separatorTokens

      String[] separatorTokens
      defines the separator tokens
      See Also:
      • Separator tokens
      Default:
      {}

    • nonSeparatorTokens

      String[] nonSeparatorTokens
      defines the non-separator tokens
      See Also:
      • Non-separator tokens
      Default:
      {}

    • localizedAttributes

      LocalizedAttribute[] localizedAttributes
      defines the localized attributes
      See Also:
      • Localized attributes
      Default:
      {}

    • embedders

      Embedder[] embedders
      defines the embedders configuration for AI-powered search
      See Also:
      • Embedders
      Default:
      {}
